releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
First version of FileTreeGenerator!
An Obsidian plugin allow you to generate file trees using [Obsidian Callouts](https://help.obsidian.md/Editing+and+formatting/Callouts)!

See [README.md](https://github.com/Unarray/FileTreeGenerator#readme) for more informations.
